title: Bitwise AND of Bits and Reversals

statement.markdown: Solve the problem and fix the bugs.

starterCode.cpp: class Solution { public: int bitwiseAND(vector<int>& nums); };
starterCode.java: public class Solution { public int bitwiseAND(int[] nums); }
starterCode.python: class Solution: def bitwiseAND(self, nums: list[int]) -> int: pass

buggyStarterCode.cpp: class Solution { public: int bitwiseAND(vector<int>& nums) { int result = 0; for(int i = 0; i < nums.size(); i++) result &= nums[i]; return result; } };
buggyStarterCode.java: public class Solution { public int bitwiseAND(int[] nums) { int result = 0; for(int i = 0; i < nums.length; i++) result &= nums[i]; return result; } }
buggyStarterCode.python: class Solution: def bitwiseAND(self, nums: list[int]) -> int: result = 0; for i in range(len(nums)): result &= nums[i]; return result;
buggyStarterCode.javascript: Solution.prototype.bitwiseAND = function(nums) { var result = 0; for(var i = 0; i < nums.length; i++) result &= nums[i]; return result; };
